title: Bridge Essay: Autonomic control of energy balance and glucose homeostasis.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Autonomic, control, of, energy, balance.

**Autonomic control of energy balance and glucose homeostasis.** — Exp Mol Med. PMID: 35474336. DOI: 10.1038/s12276-021-00705-9. Neurons in the central nervous system (CNS) communicate with peripheral organs largely via the autonomic nervous system (ANS). Through such communications, the sympathetic and parasympathetic efferent divisions of the ANS may affect thermogenesis and blood glucose levels. In contrast, peripheral organs send feedback to the CNS via hormones and autonomic afferent nerves.
